title: WayfinderAI
description: Conversational AI that helps students navigate Northeastern's campus, find rooms, and discover resources using natural language queries. Built with RAG pipeline over campus data.

title: PitLane AI
description: ML model that predicts optimal pit stop windows and tire strategies during live F1 races using telemetry data, weather, and historical patterns.

title: 6-DOF Robot Arm
description: Designed and built a 6-DOF robot arm with computer vision for object detection and grasp planning. Uses inverse kinematics solver and ROS2 for motion planning.

title: Star Tracker Mount
description: Precision motorized telescope mount that compensates for Earth's rotation for long-exposure astrophotography. Controlled via custom firmware on ESP32.
